Top 10 Logistics App Development Companies in India (2026)Introduction
The logistics sector continues to experience significant changes as businesses look for better ways to manage transportation, fleet operations, warehouse activities, order fulfillment, and real-time shipment tracking. Custom logistics applications have become an essential investment for companies that want greater visibility across supply chains, automate daily operations, and improve customer experiences.
India has become one of the leading destinations for logistics app development, offering experienced software development companies with expertise in mobile applications, cloud technologies, GPS tracking, IoT integration, route optimization, warehouse management, fleet management, and enterprise logistics solutions. Whether businesses require a last-mile delivery platform, freight management software, courier application, warehouse management system, or a complete transportation management solution, Indian development companies provide scalable and cost-effective services.
This list highlights the Top 10 Logistics App Development Companies in India (2026) based on their technical capabilities, industry experience, client portfolio, service offerings, technology expertise, and ability to deliver customized logistics software solutions for businesses of all sizes.
1. Aalpha Information Systems
Aalpha Information Systems is one of India’s well-established software development companies with extensive experience in delivering custom logistics application development solutions for startups, SMEs, logistics providers, transportation companies, wholesalers, retailers, and enterprise organizations. The company has built a reputation for developing scalable applications that improve logistics operations while simplifying supply chain management.
Its logistics software expertise includes fleet management systems, GPS-enabled tracking applications, transportation management software (TMS), warehouse management systems (WMS), courier management platforms, shipment tracking applications, delivery management software, inventory solutions, and supply chain automation platforms. The development team also integrates cloud services, APIs, IoT devices, barcode scanners, RFID technology, payment gateways, and analytics dashboards to provide complete logistics ecosystems.
Aalpha emphasizes scalable architecture, secure application development, intuitive user experiences, and future-ready technology stacks. Businesses looking for custom logistics applications often choose the company because of its flexible engagement models, transparent development process, and strong post-launch support. The company works across Android, iOS, web applications, and enterprise platforms while supporting businesses with modernization and digital transformation initiatives.
Key Services

• Logistics App Development

• Fleet Management Software

• Transportation Management Systems

• Warehouse Management Systems

• Supply Chain Solutions

• Courier & Delivery Apps

• GPS Tracking Integration

• Enterprise Software Development
2. EglobalIndia
EglobalIndia has established itself as a reliable software development company offering customized logistics application development services for transportation businesses, freight companies, delivery service providers, and warehouse operators. The company focuses on creating business-centric logistics platforms that automate operations while improving visibility throughout the supply chain.
Its development expertise includes logistics management software, vehicle tracking applications, route optimization systems, inventory management software, warehouse automation, freight booking platforms, courier management applications, and real-time shipment monitoring solutions. The company also develops cloud-enabled logistics platforms that help businesses manage operations from centralized dashboards.
EglobalIndia combines modern technologies with industry-specific requirements to build scalable logistics ecosystems. The development team emphasizes mobile accessibility, operational efficiency, data security, and seamless third-party integrations. Clients also benefit from ongoing maintenance, feature upgrades, and application optimization services after deployment.
Key Services

• Custom Logistics Software

• Delivery Management Apps

• Fleet Tracking Applications

• Warehouse Solutions

• Transportation Software

• Inventory Management

• Mobile App Development

• Cloud Software Solutions
3. Kellton
Kellton is an established Indian technology consulting and software development company that develops enterprise-grade logistics and transportation solutions for businesses operating across manufacturing, retail, eCommerce, and supply chain industries. The company specializes in building scalable applications that improve shipment visibility, warehouse coordination, fleet utilization, and delivery operations.
Its logistics software portfolio includes transportation management systems (TMS), warehouse management systems (WMS), inventory management platforms, fleet monitoring applications, freight management solutions, and last-mile delivery software. Kellton also integrates cloud platforms, IoT devices, GPS tracking, ERP systems, and business intelligence tools to create connected logistics ecosystems.
The company follows an agile development methodology and emphasizes scalable architecture, security, and enterprise integration. Its experience with digital transformation projects enables businesses to modernize legacy logistics software while improving operational efficiency and customer service.
Key Services

• Logistics App Development

• Transportation Management Systems

• Warehouse Management Software

• Fleet Management Solutions

• Supply Chain Applications

• Enterprise Software Development

• Cloud Integration

• Mobile Application Development
4. Cubix
Cubix is recognized for developing custom mobile and enterprise software solutions for businesses across logistics, transportation, retail, and on-demand services. The company builds logistics applications designed to simplify transportation planning, shipment tracking, warehouse management, and fleet operations.
Its development team creates GPS-enabled logistics platforms with route optimization, driver management, order tracking, dispatch management, proof of delivery, inventory control, and reporting dashboards. Cubix also develops cross-platform mobile applications that allow logistics businesses to monitor operations from any location.
The company places strong emphasis on intuitive user experiences, scalable application architecture, and seamless integration with third-party logistics systems, payment gateways, and enterprise software. Businesses seeking customized logistics applications often benefit from Cubix’s expertise in cloud-based software development and enterprise mobility solutions.
Key Services

• Custom Logistics Applications

• Fleet Tracking Software

• Delivery Management Systems

• Warehouse Applications

• GPS Tracking Integration

• Route Optimization

• Enterprise Mobility

• Cloud Solutions
5. Clarion Technologies
Clarion Technologies is an Indian software development company that delivers custom software solutions for logistics, transportation, supply chain, and enterprise businesses. The company has extensive experience in building scalable logistics applications that help organizations improve shipment visibility, fleet coordination, warehouse operations, and inventory management.
Its logistics development capabilities include transportation management systems (TMS), warehouse management systems (WMS), fleet management software, dispatch management platforms, freight tracking applications, inventory control solutions, and delivery management systems. Clarion Technologies also develops cloud-based logistics applications that integrate seamlessly with ERP platforms, CRM software, GPS tracking systems, payment gateways, and third-party logistics providers.
The company follows agile development practices and focuses on creating secure, high-performance software tailored to each client’s operational requirements. Its engineering team also assists businesses with application modernization, cloud migration, software maintenance, and ongoing technical support, making it a suitable partner for logistics companies planning long-term technology investments.
Key Services

• Logistics App Development

• Transportation Management Systems

• Fleet Management Software

• Warehouse Management Systems

• Inventory Management Solutions

• Enterprise Software Development

• Cloud Application Development

• Software Maintenance & Support
6. PixelCrayons
PixelCrayons is a well-established software development company offering custom logistics software solutions for transportation providers, courier businesses, warehouse operators, and supply chain organizations. The company develops applications that help businesses automate logistics processes, monitor shipments, optimize delivery routes, and manage fleet operations from centralized platforms.
Its expertise includes fleet tracking applications, transportation management software, warehouse management solutions, inventory management systems, courier management platforms, shipment tracking applications, and last-mile delivery software. PixelCrayons also integrates cloud technologies, GPS services, API integrations, IoT devices, and analytics dashboards to build connected logistics ecosystems.
With experience serving startups, SMEs, and enterprises across multiple industries, PixelCrayons focuses on delivering scalable, secure, and user-friendly logistics applications. The company also provides post-deployment support, software upgrades, and customization services to help businesses adapt their logistics platforms as operational requirements evolve.
Key Services

• Custom Logistics Software Development

• Fleet Tracking Applications

• Transportation Management Systems

• Warehouse Management Software

• Courier & Delivery Applications

• GPS & IoT Integration

• Enterprise Mobility Solutions

• Cloud-Based Logistics Platforms
7. SPEC INDIA
SPEC INDIA is a long-established software development company delivering enterprise applications for logistics, transportation, manufacturing, and distribution businesses. The company develops customized logistics software that enables organizations to manage transportation operations, warehouse activities, inventory movement, and delivery workflows from centralized platforms.
Its logistics solutions include transportation management systems, warehouse management software, fleet management applications, shipment tracking systems, route planning tools, inventory management platforms, and reporting dashboards. SPEC INDIA also integrates ERP software, cloud services, GPS technology, and third-party logistics systems to create connected operational environments.
The company is known for delivering scalable enterprise software with strong security practices, flexible customization options, and comprehensive post-deployment support. Its logistics development experience helps businesses improve operational efficiency while maintaining visibility across the entire supply chain.
Key Services

• Logistics Software Development

• Transportation Management Systems

• Warehouse Management

• Fleet Management Applications

• Shipment Tracking

• Inventory Management

• Enterprise Software

• Cloud Integration
8. Quytech
Quytech develops innovative logistics software designed to improve transportation efficiency, inventory visibility, and warehouse management. The company builds customized applications for courier businesses, freight operators, retailers, and logistics startups.
